sp.question: ¿De qué país era el piloto Ayrton Senna?
sp.fact: Senna es considerado uno de los mayores ídolos deportivos de Brasil.

en.question: Which country was Ayrton Senna from?
en.fact: Senna is considered one of Brazil’s greatest sporting icons.

sp.question: ¿En qué año debutó Ayrton Senna en la Fórmula 1?
sp.fact: Debutó con el modesto equipo Toleman.

en.question: In which year did Ayrton Senna debut in Formula 1?
en.fact: He made his debut with the modest Toleman team.

sp.question: ¿Cuántos campeonatos del mundo ganó Ayrton Senna?

en.question: How many World Championships did Ayrton Senna win?
en.fact: He won the titles in 1988, 1990 and 1991.

sp.question: ¿Con qué equipo logró Senna sus mayores éxitos?
sp.fact: Con McLaren ganó sus tres campeonatos mundiales.

en.question: With which team did Senna achieve his greatest success?
en.fact: He won all three of his World Championships with McLaren.

sp.question: ¿Qué habilidad destacaba especialmente en Ayrton Senna?
sp.fact: Sus actuaciones en lluvia son legendarias.

en.question: Which skill did Ayrton Senna particularly excel at?
en.fact: His performances in the rain are legendary.

sp.question: ¿En qué circuito logró Ayrton Senna seis victorias?
sp.fact: Es el piloto más exitoso en la historia del GP de Mónaco.

en.question: At which circuit did Ayrton Senna achieve six victories?
en.fact: He is the most successful driver in Monaco Grand Prix history.

sp.question: ¿Cuántas poles position consiguió Ayrton Senna en F1?
sp.fact: Durante años tuvo el récord histórico de poles.

en.question: How many pole positions did Ayrton Senna achieve in F1?
en.fact: He held the all-time pole position record for many years.

sp.question: ¿Qué rivalidad marcó la carrera de Senna a finales de los 80?
sp.fact: Es una de las rivalidades más intensas de la F1.

en.question: Which rivalry defined Senna’s career in the late 1980s?
en.fact: It is one of the most intense rivalries in F1 history.

sp.question: ¿En qué equipo competía Senna en 1994?
sp.fact: Solo disputó tres carreras con Williams.

en.question: Which team did Senna race for in 1994?
en.fact: He only competed in three races with Williams.

sp.question: ¿Qué casco caracterizaba a Ayrton Senna?
options: Amarillo con franjas verdes y azules
sp.answer: Amarillo con franjas verdes y azules
sp.fact: Representaba los colores de la bandera de Brasil.

en.question: Which helmet design was Ayrton Senna known for?
options: Yellow with green and blue stripes
en.answer: Yellow with green and blue stripes
en.fact: It represented the colors of the Brazilian flag.

sp.question: ¿En qué circuito falleció Ayrton Senna?
sp.fact: El accidente ocurrió durante el GP de San Marino de 1994.

en.question: At which circuit did Ayrton Senna pass away?
en.fact: The accident happened during the 1994 San Marino Grand Prix.

sp.question: ¿Qué curva fue escenario del accidente fatal de Senna?
sp.fact: Tras el accidente, la curva fue modificada por seguridad.

en.question: Which corner was the site of Senna’s fatal accident?
en.fact: After the accident, the corner was modified for safety reasons.

sp.question: ¿Qué aspecto del pilotaje de Senna era considerado único?
options: Su conexión espiritual con la conducción
sp.answer: Su conexión espiritual con la conducción
sp.fact: Senna hablaba de entrar en un estado de concentración total.

en.question: Which aspect of Senna’s driving was considered unique?
en.fact: Senna spoke about reaching a state of total focus.

sp.question: ¿Qué legado dejó Ayrton Senna en la Fórmula 1?
sp.fact: Su fallecimiento impulsó grandes cambios en seguridad.

en.question: What legacy did Ayrton Senna leave in Formula 1?
en.fact: His death led to major safety improvements in the sport.

sp.question: ¿Por qué Ayrton Senna es considerado una leyenda de la F1?
options: Por su talento, carisma e impacto histórico
sp.answer: Por su talento, carisma e impacto histórico
sp.fact: Su figura trasciende lo puramente deportivo.

en.question: Why is Ayrton Senna considered a Formula 1 legend?
options: Because of his number of races
Because of his talent, charisma and historical impact
Because he raced for many teams
en.answer: Because of his talent, charisma and historical impact
en.fact: His legacy goes far beyond sporting achievements.
